prompt.description: Text prompt describing what should appear in the video

start_image.description: Start image for video generation. Use alone for image-to-video, or with end_image for start/end-to-video. Accepts public URL or Base64 data URI (data:image/png;base64,...)

end_image.description: End image for start/end-to-video generation. Must be used together with start_image. Accepts public URL or Base64 data URI (data:image/png;base64,...)

audio.description: Enable audio-video synchronization. Default: true for Q3 models. When false, outputs silent video
